sourcesContent:
export const courses = [
  {
    code: 'PY-01',
    name: 'Python',
    level: 'Beginner → Job-ready',
    duration: '10 weeks',
    description:
      'Write real programs from day one: syntax, data structures, automation scripts, and a portfolio project in Flask.',
    skills: ['Core Python', 'OOP', 'Automation', 'Flask'],
    // featured: true,
  },
  {
    code: 'WD-02',
    name: 'Web Development',
    level: 'Beginner → Intermediate',
    duration: '12 weeks',
    description:
      'HTML, CSS and JavaScript fundamentals, then React — build and ship a full multi-page site of your own.',
    skills: ['HTML/CSS', 'JavaScript', 'React', 'Deployment'],
  },
  {
    code: 'DS-03',
    name: 'Data Science',
    level: 'Intermediate',
    duration: '14 weeks',
    description:
      'Clean and explore real datasets, then model them: pandas, visualization, and applied statistics.',
    skills: ['Pandas', 'Visualization', 'Statistics', 'ML Basics'],
  },
  {
    code: 'UX-04',
    name: 'UI / UX Design',
    level: 'Beginner',
    duration: '8 weeks',
    description:
      'Design thinking, wireframes and prototypes in Figma — end with a case study you can show employers.',
    skills: ['Figma', 'Wireframing', 'Prototyping', 'Case Study'],
  },
]
